name: @microsoft/mxc-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for MXC (Microsoft eXecution Containers)

scripts.test:unit: npm run build:test-unit && node --test dist-tests/tests/unit/sandbox.test.js dist-tests/tests/unit/policy.test.js dist-tests/tests/unit/logger.test.js
scripts.test:integration: cd tests/integration && npm install && npm run build && npm test

author: Microsoft Corporation
